title: Youmind 17778 Youmind 17778
prompt: A high-quality vector art portrait of a young person with {argument name="hair" default="curly dark hair"}, a mustache, and round black glasses. The subject is rendered in a grayscale comic-book style with bold line art. Their {argument name="clothing" default="black t-shirt"} and parts of the composition are accented with vibrant, abstract paint splashes in red, bright blue, and orange. In the background, a large glowing white full moon with realistic crater textures acts as a circular halo frame. Clean white background, minimalist flat design, sharp edges, pop art influence, 8k resolution, highly detailed digital illustration.
